remarks: Experience the perfect blend of character, style, and convenience in this beautifully renovated 2-bedroom + den, 1-bath apartment in a desirable Norwalk location. Featuring soaring ceilings, gleaming hardwood floors, and an open, airy layout, this home offers the sought-after feel of a modern loft while providing all the comforts of everyday living. The updated kitchen showcases contemporary finishes and flows seamlessly into the spacious living area, creating an inviting space for both entertaining and everyday living. In addition to two comfortable bedrooms, a versatile den provides the perfect space for a home office, guest room, nursery, fitness area, or creative studio. A beautifully renovated full bath completes the thoughtfully designed interior. One off-street parking space is included. Ideally located just moments from Norwalk's vibrant restaurants, shopping, and entertainment, with easy access to the Route 7 Connector and major commuting routes, you'll enjoy exceptional convenience and connectivity. Whether you're heading to work, dining out, or exploring everything the area has to offer, you'll love having it all within easy reach. Move-in ready and full of charm, this stylish 2-bedroom with den is a rare opportunity to enjoy loft-inspired living in the heart of Norwalk.
